commands.command:
cat << EOF > /tmp/env-var-app-pod.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: env-var-app
  namespace: case8-test
  labels:
    app: env-var-app
spec:
  containers:
  - name: env-var-app
    image: env-var-app:latest
    env:
    - name: APP_MODE
      value: production
    - name: API_KEY
      value: secret-api-key
    - name: DATABASE_URL
      value: postgresql://db:5432/mydb
EOF

kubectl apply -f /tmp/env-var-app-pod.yaml
